## Summary / Resumen

- briefly explain what this PR changes
- explica brevemente que cambia este PR

## Verification / Verificacion

- [ ] I ran `pnpm run check`
- [ ] ejecute `pnpm run check`
- [ ] if I changed setup or security docs, I verified the documented commands, paths, and file names still exist
- [ ] si cambie documentacion de configuracion inicial o seguridad, verifique que los comandos, rutas y nombres de archivo documentados sigan existiendo
- [ ] if I changed dependencies, I reviewed the `Dependency Review` result
- [ ] si cambie dependencias, revise el resultado de `Dependency Review`
- [ ] if I changed workflows, I reviewed permissions, triggers, and the use of SHA-pinned actions
- [ ] si cambie flujos de trabajo, revise permisos, eventos y el uso de actions fijadas por SHA
- [ ] if I changed `opencode.json` or `.opencode/`, I confirmed the change is intentional and safe
- [ ] si cambie `opencode.json` o `.opencode/`, confirme que el cambio es intencional y seguro

## Security / Seguridad

- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens, or credentials to code, docs, or workflows
- [ ] no agregue secretos, tokens ni credenciales a codigo, documentacion o flujos de trabajo
- [ ] I did not use `pull_request_target` to check out or execute PR code
- [ ] no use `pull_request_target` para hacer checkout o ejecutar codigo del PR
- [ ] I did not expand `GITHUB_TOKEN` permissions without a real need
- [ ] no amplie permisos de `GITHUB_TOKEN` sin una necesidad real
